creator: arichardson@FreeBSD.org
text: Note: this is QEMU running with as `qemu-system-x86_64 -M accel=tcg -cpu Nehalem -smp 8 -m 2048 -nographic -drive if=none,file=/local/scratch/alr48/cheri/output/freebsd-amd64.img,id=drv,format=raw -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=drv`, so possibly related to the -smp option. I have not seen it without QEMU's smp flag.
